statusLine.command: input=$(cat); cwd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.cwd' | sed "s|^$HOME|~|"); model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name'); remaining=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.remaining_percentage // empty'); cost=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.cost.total_cost_usd // empty'); status="${cwd}  ${model}"; [ -n "$remaining" ] && status="${status}  ctx:${remaining}%"; [ -n "$cost" ] && status="${status}  \$$(printf '%.4f' $cost)"; echo "$status"
